column7:
Every 30 minutes, weapon and armor stats are switched from default to crafted.
So for 30 minutes, you'll have weapons and armor with their base stats, and then for the next 30 minutes,
you'll have weapons and armor with the maximum stats that crafting can provide.
Make sure to check whether the spreadsheet is in "crafting mode" or "default mode".
You can see this in the Item tab, column Q, row 6 or in the TTK tab, line 4. If it says “Custom,” that means
the weapons and armor have their base stats, and if it says “Max,” that means the weapons and armor
have the maximum stats that crafting can provide.

You can see the maximum bonuses provided by crafting under the “Item” tab, columns X and Y for weapons
(Fire Rate and Damage), and under the “DmgRes” tab, column J for armor resistance.

The formulas are based on the data displayed by the in-game UI. I haven't been able to test them in-game yet,
so there may be errors.

column5:
These spreadsheets contain FPS data found in the game files extracted using
unp4k by alluran. Note that these values/calculations may not be accurate.
